| Room / Category | Tariff / Detail |
| --- | --- |
| TWIN | 490,000 |
| SINGLE | 540,000 |
package.inclusions_text:
- Hospital Stay | 4 day-ward , 2 day-ICU
- Pharmacy Charges : IP | 24000
- Pharmacy Charges : OT | 50000
- Implants | 180000
- Investigations : | TWIN-11000,SINGLE-12000,
- Surgeon Charges : | TWIN - 90000,SINGLE - 90000,
- Anaesthesia charges : | TWIN - 22500,SINGLE - 22500,
- Assistants Surgeon & Anaesthesia: | As per the policy
package.exclusions_text:
- Cross Consultation.
- Virology Disposable Kit.
- Ventilator Charges.
- Patient attender Food & Beverages, additional orders.
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure.
- Diabetic Management.
- Beyond the package days, all services and investigations are charged based on actual costs.
package.documentation_notes:
- Clean Markdown / TKR-Bilateral-Regular: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- Excel Markdown / TKR-Bilateral-Regular: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- FC History / TKR (TOTAL KNEE REPLACEMENT)- BILATERAL: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.

---
package.inclusions_text_clean:
- Hospital Stay: 4 days (ward) + 2 days (ICU)
- Pharmacy: IP medicines up to ₹24,000 + OT medicines up to ₹50,000
- Implants: Up to ₹1,80,000
- Investigations: Up to ₹11,000 (Twin) / Up to ₹12,000 (Single)
- Surgeon Charges: Up to ₹90,000
- Anaesthesia Charges: Up to ₹22,500
- Assistant Surgeon & Anaesthesia: As per hospital policy
package.exclusions_text_clean:
- Cross-specialty consultations
- Virology disposable kit
- Ventilator charges
- Attender food & beverages and additional patient orders
- Any medications or investigations not related to the procedure
- Diabetic management
- Any stay, services, investigations, or consumables beyond the package duration (charged as per actuals)
